original_prompt: 给这套产品穿戴在一个黑色人体模特头上（非真人），纯白背景，无文案
optimized_prompt: Commercial product photography of a luxury crystal jewelry set worn on a matte black mannequin head against a pure white background (#FFFFFF). [Visual Description]: The set includes a sparkling silver tiara with intricate filigree and large teardrop crystals, a matching diamond-style choker necklace, and a pair of chandelier earrings. The jewelry is elegantly displayed on a sleek, faceless black mannequin bust to maximize contrast and sparkle. [Lighting]: Bright, even studio lighting with soft reflections on the crystals. Soft natural contact shadow at the base of the mannequin. [Text & UI Layout]: No text, no props, clean minimalist composition, 85% scale, centered.
layout_logic: Since the request specifies 'No Text', the layout logic is purely visual. Center the black mannequin bust vertically and horizontally. Ensure the white background is blown out to pure #FFFFFF for Amazon compliance. The black mannequin serves as a high-contrast anchor to make the silver and crystal jewelry pop. Maintain a comfortable margin around the mannequin so the tiara doesn't touch the top edge.
